_description: Swarm section added to .claude/autonomous-tests.json — each agent spins up its own isolated Docker environment

swarm.dockerContext: docker-desktop | default | custom-name — auto-detected, Docker Desktop prioritized
swarm.mode: compose | raw-docker — compose uses docker-compose files; raw-docker uses docker run commands
swarm.composeFile: docker-compose.yml | null — path to compose file (compose mode only)

rawDockerServices.name: service-name
rawDockerServices._comment: raw-docker mode only — each service becomes a docker run command

envPortMappings._comment: direct: value IS the port (PORT=8000); url: port embedded in URL (DATABASE_URL=postgres://localhost:5432/db)

commands: docker compose -p {projectName} exec backend python manage.py migrate
docker compose -p {projectName} exec backend python manage.py seed_test_data

project-name.mode: compose | raw-docker | npm-dev — npm-dev runs on host via startCommand with per-agent isolation
project-name.startCommand: npm run dev | null — host process start command (npm-dev mode only)
project-name.projectPath: /absolute/path/to/project | null — source directory to copy for isolation (npm-dev mode only)

envOverrides._comment: env vars resolved per-agent — {port} and {backendPort} from assigned range

project-name.nodeModulesStrategy: symlink | hardlink | copy — symlink (default): ln -s, fast; hardlink: cp -al, Turbopack-compatible; copy: cp -r, universally compatible. Auto-detected from bundler in package.json.

resourceLimits.memory: 512m | 1g | null — --memory flag per container. Default: null (no limit)
resourceLimits.cpus: 0.5 | 1 | null — --cpus flag per container. Default: null (no limit)
resourceLimits.readOnlyRootfs: false — read-only rootfs with --read-only. Default: false. Requires tmpfsMounts for writable paths
resourceLimits._defaults: All null/false — resource limits are opt-in, not enforced by default

audit.enabled: true — per-agent structured audit logs. Default: true
audit._defaults: Enabled by default, schemaVersion tracks audit JSON format evolution

_templatePlaceholders.{projectName}: swarm-{N} — agent's compose project / container prefix
_templatePlaceholders.{port}: assigned host port for that service
_templatePlaceholders.{backendPort}: assigned host port for the backend service (primary compose stack)
